title: Auth test debugging run 2
body: Investigated the auth integration test timeout that kills the pipeline at step 11. The test hits the /auth/validate endpoint and expects a 200 within 5 seconds, but we're seeing the client hang and the test runner kill the process after 30 seconds. Traced it to a network misconfiguration: the auth service's DNS entry was pointing to a deprecated load balancer that randomly drops packets. Also found that the connection pool wasn't recycling half‑open sockets, so retries just piled up. Next step: update the service DNS record to the new internal LB and add a socket keep‑alive in the client config.
